event.description:
We got one of the Cloudera Kudu team members to present Kudu, the data store for modern hardware, at SF Spark and Friends. Please register there!
http://www.meetup.com/SF-Spark-and-Friends/events/226023299/
event.title: [cross-posted from sfspark.org] Kafka+Spark+Kudu demo [register at SFSF]
